Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates the presence of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia" as one of the diagnoses. This diagnosis directly relates to lipid metabolism disorders, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is explicitly mentioned, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit. The presence of this diagnosis suggests that there is an ongoing management or recognition of a lipid disorder, which aligns with the criteria for predicting a future diagnosis.
